> **Note**: Braid is not currently accepting feature requests. This template exists for future use. Your suggestion will be logged but may not receive a response.

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe your ideal solution.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you have considered.

## Additional Context

Any other context, mockups, or references.
